test_cases.description: Build all 7 layers on a new folder of markdown notes with no .obsidian/ config
test_cases.prompt: I have a folder of markdown notes at C:\Users\YourUser\.claude\skills\vault-build-workspace\test-vault-1. Turn it into a proper Obsidian vault with dashboards, MOCs, templates, canvases, and everything.
test_cases.setup_notes: Create test-vault-1/ with 3 folders (projects/, research/, decisions/) and 10+ .md files with YAML frontmatter before running. Files should have varied status, priority, and tags.

assertions.description: .obsidian/ directory is created with app.json, appearance.json, core-plugins.json, community-plugins.json
Dataview plugin installed at .obsidian/plugins/dataview/ with all 4 files
At least 2 dashboard files created in _dashboards/ with Dataview queries
Dashboard queries use FROM clauses that match actual vault folders (not generic placeholders)
At least 1 MOC file created with curated wikilinks + auto-discovery query
Templates created in _templates/ matching detected note categories
At least 1 .canvas file created with valid JSON (nodes + edges arrays)
graph.json has colorGroups array with at least 3 entries matching vault folders
bookmarks.json has items array with at least 2 entries

test_cases.description: Add dashboards and canvases to an existing vault without overwriting config
test_cases.prompt: My Obsidian vault at C:\Users\YourUser\coding-vault has notes but I want to verify what /vault-build would add. Run in dry-run mode: /vault-build C:\Users\YourUser\coding-vault --dry-run
test_cases.setup_notes: Uses the real coding-vault which already has .obsidian/, dashboards, MOCs, templates, canvases. Dry-run should detect existing files and report what would be skipped vs added.

assertions.description: Reports that .obsidian/ already exists and would be merged (not overwritten)
Reports existing dashboards and does not propose overwriting them
In dry-run mode, no files are actually created or modified
Output includes vault analysis: folder counts, frontmatter patterns, tag summary

test_cases.description: Run only Phase 3 (dashboards) on a vault that already has .obsidian/ config
test_cases.prompt: Just add dashboards to my vault at C:\Users\YourUser\.claude\skills\vault-build-workspace\test-vault-2. /vault-build C:\Users\YourUser\.claude\skills\vault-build-workspace\test-vault-2 --phase 3
test_cases.setup_notes: Create test-vault-2/ with .obsidian/ (from Phase 1) and dataview plugin (from Phase 2) pre-installed, plus 8+ notes in 2 folders. Phase 3 only should create dashboards without touching templates, MOCs, canvases, or graph config.

assertions.description: No _templates/ directory created (Phase 6 was not requested)
No MOC-*.md files created (Phase 4 was not requested)
